text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over the past day, with Ethereum underperforming slightly, while the broader altcoin complex shows deeper losses—a pattern that typically reflects risk-off sentiment. The Fear & Greed index at 23 signals extreme fear, though the recent 13-point rise suggests some stabilization after a sharper selloff. Bitcoin dominance at 56.3% and $81B in daily volume indicate investors are rotating toward safer assets rather than exiting crypto entirely.
